name: Guy's Chinese Chicken (Nfwf89a)
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups snow peas, fresh or thawed
recipeInstructions:
This recipe serves 4 but can be halved for 2. The chicken is best enjoyed the next day as lunch or a side dish when mixed with rice.
1. Cut chicken into strips and toss with 1 tablespoon soy sauce. Set aside.
2. Mix remaining soy sauce, chicken broth, and cornstarch in a separate bowl. Set aside.
3. Heat 1 1/2 tablespoons oil in a wok or large frying pan over high heat until very hot.
4. Quickly stir fry the drained chicken strips until browned. Remove from the wok and keep warm.
5. Add remaining oil to the wok and stir fry vegetables (peas, mushrooms, celery, onion) over medium heat for 4-5 minutes.
6. Return chicken to the wok and add broth mixture. Bring to a boil, stirring constantly.
7. Add nuts and heat for about one minute more.
8. Serve immediately over white rice or sticky rice. Enjoy!
